content:
I’m happy to share that I’m starting a new position as an Associate at Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas, Delhi on the TMT- Dispute Resolution team!

Looking forward to learning and contributing to the firm to the best of my abilities!
comment: TMT disputes tend to sit at intersection of fast-evolving tech facts and slow court timelines; early exposure to evidence preservation and technical records matters more than pleadings.
